name: live2d-haxe
description: Live2D Cubism SDK for Haxe - GPU shader rendering with multi-backend abstraction (cpp + hl, OpenFL/Flixel/Heaps)
releasenote: v1.0.0: First stable release. Heaps performance (sync ordering fix eliminates double GPU upload, grow-only Dynamic buffer reuse, mask RT cache pool for concurrent models), Heaps DX combo (stat-mtime hot-reload + h2d.filter.Group chain API), LipSync backend specialization (L2DAudioSourceBase + L2DHeapsAudioSource/L2DOpenFLAudioSource/L2DFlixelAudioSource driving amplitude from live playback position). No breaking changes.
